params.sharesOwner: Address that will own the shares

collectAggregateFees(address).details: Only callable by the protocol fee controller.

disableRecoveryMode(address).details: Only governance can disable recovery mode.

enableQuery().details: Will revert if queries were permanently disabled.

enableRecoveryMode(address).details: Recovery mode allows proportional exits only and forfeits yield fees. Permissionless if pool/vault is paused, otherwise requires governance.

pauseVault().details: Can only be called within the pause window by governance.

disableRecoveryMode(address).notice: Disables recovery mode for a pool.

enableRecoveryMode(address).notice: Enables recovery mode for a pool.

facetInterfaces().notice: Declares the interfaces implemented by the exposing facet for use in a composing proxy.

facetMetadata().notice: Declares comprehensive metadata about the exposing facet.

facetName().notice: Declares a canonical nonunique name for the exposing facet.

getMinimumPoolTokens().notice: Get the minimum number of tokens in a pool.

getPauseWindowEndTime().notice: Returns the Vault's pause window end time.

getPoolMinimumTotalSupply().notice: Get the minimum total supply of pool tokens (BPT) for an initialized pool.

getVaultPausedState().notice: Returns the vault's paused state and time windows.

removeLiquidityFromBuffer(address,uint25.notice: Removes liquidity from an internal ERC4626 buffer.
